Container.Name: nfsen-ng-nfcapd
Container.Overview: NetFlow / sFlow / IPFIX collector (nfcapd) for nfsen-ng. It runs the nfcapd daemon from the nfsen-ng image, listening on a UDP port and writing rotated flow files that the nfsen-ng web UI reads. Point your router/switch flow exporter (pfSense/OPNsense/MikroTik/…) at this host on the collector port (default 9995/UDP). Mount this container on the SAME appdata path as the nfsen-ng UI, and make sure the write directory's last path segment (default "flows") matches one of the UI's Sources. This container has no web interface.
Container.Requires: Install the nfsen-ng UI template too, and mount both containers on the SAME data path (default /mnt/user/appdata/nfsen-ng). The last segment of the write path (-w .../live/<name>, default "flows") must match one of the UI's NFSEN_SOURCES. A device on your network must export flows to this host's collector UDP port.

Config.Name: Collector port
Config.Description: UDP port nfcapd listens on. Configure your router's NetFlow/sFlow/IPFIX exporter to send here.

Config.Name: Data (profiles)
Config.Description: Same data directory the nfsen-ng UI reads. nfcapd writes into live/<source> under it.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Should match the UI container.
